name: @codenexus/monitor
description: Browser-based monitoring dashboard for CodeNexus Online Judge — service status, feature flags, AI metrics, stream backlogs, and process control matrix.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit && vite build && esbuild src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.js --external:node:net --external:node:http --external:node:fs --external:node:path --external:node:url --external:node:module
